projects.title: Flavor da Casa
projects.description: A full-stack management system built with Spring Boot and Clean Architecture. It handles event scheduling, seating, and guest reservations through a custom REST API.

projects.title: UniCycle Marketplace
projects.description: A verified online marketplace for university students to trade items. Developed solo using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB while following RUP methodology.

projects.title: Campus Bites
projects.description: A student-focused platform built with ASP.NET Core MVC. Key features include role-based access control, content moderation workflows, and secure image handling.

projects.title: TriviaQuest
projects.description: A real-time trivia game utilizing WebSockets for live communication and leaderboards. Developed for a Networking course to support configurable categories and multiplayer syncing.

projects.title: Developer Portfolio
projects.description: This site is a data-driven SPA built with Handlebars and JSON. It features custom URL-param routing and system-aware dark/light theming for a seamless user experience.
